distractors.off_target_set: Systems with no security surface; theoretical vulnerabilities without reproducible attack paths; non-security plan stress-testing; meta-questions about red teaming
distractors.description: Items where there is no attack surface to probe, or where findings are speculative without concrete attack paths

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND false_positive_rate <= 0.20
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
